title.en-US: Amoco - privileged remote access - no VPN - privileged users

quoteText.en-US: "With BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access, we could tighten our control over what privileged users could and could not do, as well as audit their actions. It’s a far superior approach than just giving them unrestricted VPN access."

quoteSource.en-US: —Tommy Green, VP Of Information Systems & Technology, AMOCO Federal Credit Union
